title: [CI:DOCS Fix some typos in documentation and comments (found by codespell)

comments.body:
Thank you for your PR! Good catches.

The `completions` files are autogenerated: they cannot be hand-edited. Could you remove those changes, and submit that portion of your PR to https://github.com/spf13/cobra instead?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Luap99*, *stweil* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
